creator: alex@rk86.com
text:
Freebsd 7.2, bugzilla 3.23, mysql 5.077, perl 5.10, p5-DBD-mysql

After upgrade from the perl 5.8 to 5.10 (with rebuilding all perl related installed ports), bugzilla failes to find DBD-mysql module

checksetup output:

Checking available perl DBD modules...
Checking for              DBD-Pg (v1.45)    not found 
Checking for           DBD-mysql (v4.00)    not found 
Checking for          DBD-Oracle (v1.19)    not found 

p5-DBD-mysql is installed,
output from instmodsh (-l)

..
 DBD::mysql
..
